metric_definitions.bleu4: Sentence BLEU-4 with NLTK method3 smoothing; English word/punctuation tokens, Chinese Han-character/alphanumeric tokens.
metric_definitions.rouge: ROUGE-1/2/L F1 on the same language-aware tokens.
metric_definitions.semantic: Cosine similarity of normalized BGE-M3 CLS embeddings.
metric_definitions.format_type_match: Exact match of coarse container (plain/JSON/XML/code) and list style (none/numbered/bulleted).
metric_definitions.format_structure_score: Mean similarity over container, list style, multiline, headings, list count, line count, and paragraph count.
metric_definitions.validator_adherence: Pass rate of the dataset-specified deterministic validator; not applicable to descriptive/style full-prompt-similarity rows.
metric_definitions.kl_macro: Mean of per-example mean token KL.
metric_definitions.kl_micro: Mean over every aligned teacher-forced output token across examples.
